positive: A whimsical botanical illustration featuring hyper-detailed watercolor renderings of oversized peonies, lavender sprigs, and delicate hummingbirds. The style should be soft, ethereal, and perfect for a sticker print, using a palette of dusty rose, sage green, and cream. Minimal background, highly decorative, trending on Pinterest.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
